summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Star Trek TNG LCARS Knowledge Database - Iteration 4. All new features working: Web Audio API sound effects, voice recording with Whisper transcription, role-based edit/delete permissions, chat session history (VERLAUF), and stardate integration. Both backend APIs and frontend UI fully functional.

minor_issues.issue: AudioContext warnings in console due to browser autoplay restrictions
minor_issues.impact: Cosmetic only - sounds work after user interaction

passed_tests: Backend API health check (/api/health)
New stardate calculation endpoint (/api/stardate)
Transcribe endpoint validation (/api/transcribe)
Captain P login with correct credentials
Nummer Eins login with correct credentials
Role-based permissions (Captain can edit/delete, Nummer Eins cannot)
Article CRUD operations with proper authorization
Dashboard statistics display
Computer chat functionality with LLM integration
Chat session history and VERLAUF button
Knowledge base search and filtering
Article detail view with edit/delete buttons for Captain only
Article Editor with voice recorder section
Voice recording UI components (start/stop buttons)
Splash screen with TNG computer initialization
Quote panel rotation on dashboard
LOGBUCH navigation restricted to Captain only
Sound effects integration (useLCARSSound hook)
Stardate display throughout the application
Logout functionality working correctly
